mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contents_daily_stats (STAT_DATE, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{statDt}, #{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT)
INSERT INTO contents_view_stats (CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT)

INSERT IGNORE INTO contents_daily_stats (STAT_DATE, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES
(#{item.viewDt}, #{item.ctntNo}, #{item.viewCnt})
